Audit: homelab
Status: ERROR
Runner: 192.168.0.112 (in spec networks: nightfall)

[ERR ] subnet_discovery: subnet_discovery timed out
       ΓÇó The check took too long and was cancelled.
       ΓÇó Common causes:
       ΓÇó   - The target network/segment is not reachable from the current interface (or runner).
       ΓÇó   - The subnet is very large and the scan is slow.
       ΓÇó   - Hosts are aggressively filtering or rate-limiting discovery traffic.
       ΓÇó   - You're running from the wrong VLAN/adapter for this check.
       ΓÇó Try: --interface <name> to force a specific NIC, or add a probe inside the target segment.
[ERR ] subnet_discovery: subnet_discovery timed out
       ΓÇó The check took too long and was cancelled.
       ΓÇó Common causes:
       ΓÇó   - The target network/segment is not reachable from the current interface (or runner).
       ΓÇó   - The subnet is very large and the scan is slow.
       ΓÇó   - Hosts are aggressively filtering or rate-limiting discovery traffic.
       ΓÇó   - You're running from the wrong VLAN/adapter for this check.
       ΓÇó Try: --interface <name> to force a specific NIC, or add a probe inside the target segment.
